source: ## Pay by Card Token API (request table + code-block URL + Response table)

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: Header authentication. x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.

parameters.name: card_key
parameters.description: Card authorization key.

parameters.name: card_token
parameters.description: Card token.

parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: merchant_id
parameters.description: Involved merchant's identifier as defined on Portal.

parameters.name: merchant_group_id
parameters.description: Merchant management settings. Cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, times 100.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Transaction currency (ISO 4217 alphabetic code, e.g., TWD).

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: A self-defined identifier for each transaction. Doesn't allow null.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Must be unique.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Item description. Required for PCI compliance.

parameters.name: cardholder
parameters.description: Information of the cardholder. Same sub-fields as Pay by Prime.

parameters.name: cardholder.phone_number_country_code
parameters.description: Phone number country code (default 886).

parameters.name: cardholder.phone_number
parameters.description: Cardholder phone number. E.164 format.

parameters.name: cardholder.name
parameters.description: Name

parameters.name: cardholder.name_en
parameters.description: If blank, a default value will be forwarded.

parameters.name: cardholder.email
parameters.description: Cardholder email address. RFC 5322.

parameters.name: cardholder.zip_code
parameters.description: Zip code number

parameters.name: cardholder.address
parameters.description: Billing address

parameters.name: cardholder.national_id
parameters.description: National ID

parameters.name: cardholder.member_id
parameters.description: Member ID. Supported: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: cardholder.bank_member_id
parameters.description: Required for binding transaction on e-payments.

parameters.name: cardholder_verify
parameters.description: Authentication Fields for KYC. Supported: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: cardholder_verify.phone_number
parameters.description: Whether to verify phone number

parameters.name: cardholder_verify.national_id
parameters.description: Whether to verify national id

parameters.name: kyc_verification_merchant_id
parameters.description: The merchant id can only do authentication except authorization.

parameters.name: instalment
parameters.description: Number of intervals. Default 0. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: delay_capture_in_days
parameters.description: Days between authorization and capture. Default 0. Use -1 to disable automatic capture.

parameters.name: three_domain_secure
parameters.description: Enable 3D Secure. Default false. Only Direct Pay.

parameters.name: result_url
parameters.description: Result notification URL. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

parameters.name: result_url.frontend_redirect_url
parameters.description: Frontend redirect URL. Must start with https.

parameters.name: result_url.backend_notify_url
parameters.description: Backend notify URL. https, port 443.

parameters.name: result_url.go_back_url
parameters.description: Go back button URL on the TapPay Payment Error page.

parameters.name: card_ccv
parameters.description: Security code. Cannot be used together with ccv_prime. Only Direct Pay.

parameters.name: redeem
parameters.description: Whether to use the redeem. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: additional_data
parameters.description: Data will be encrypted and decrypted when other customization requirements.

parameters.name: ccv_prime
parameters.description: One time token of security code from get-ccv-prime. Cannot be used with card_ccv. Expires after 90 seconds. Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: ID of each device. Required when using TapPay RBA risk analysis.

parameters.name: is_merchant_initiated_transaction
parameters.description: Whether MIT (true) or CIT (false). Default false.

parameters.name: cardholderinfo_prime
parameters.description: Obtain using get-cardholderinfo-prime.

request.description: JSON request body. Headers: Content-Type: application/json, x-api-key: YourPartnerKey. Sandbox: https://sandbox.tappaysdk.com/tpc/payment/pay-by-token ; Production: https://prod.tappaysdk.com/tpc/payment/pay-by-token

responses.description: Transaction result. status=0 indicates success; see response field table (rec_trade_id, auth_code, card_info, update_cardholderinfo_result, etc.). HTTP status code not stated; 200 assumed.

missing: HTTP status code not stated; 200 assumed
No response JSON example (only a field table)
Request example omits the table-required 'cardholder' field
